data.title: South Korea Blocks Apps of Crypto Exchanges on Apple, Google Stores
data.description:
Google and Apple pulled apps, including KuCoin and MEXC, after authorities flagged them for operating without proper registration.
source: https://decrypt.co/314786/south-korea-blocks-apps-crypto-exchanges-apple-google-stores

data.title: Deadline Approaches for Terra Cryptocurrency Loss Claims
data.description: According to PANews, Terra has issued a reminder on the X platform regarding the deadline for submitting cryptocurrency loss claims to the Terraform Labs Pte. Ltd. liquidation trust fund. Creditors must file their eligible claims by May 16, 2025, at 23:59 ET (UTC+8: May 17, 2025, at 11:59). Claims submitted after this deadline will not be accepted.

data.title: Terra: Deadline to submit loss claims to the Terraform Liquidation Trust is May 17
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Terra officials issued a reminder on the X platform that the deadline for submitting cryptocurrency loss claims to the Terraform Labs Pte. Ltd. Liquidation Trust Fund is 23:59 ET on May 16, 2025 (11:59 Beijing time on May 17, 2025). Creditors must submit their eligible cryptocurrency loss claims before this date. Late submissions will not be accepted.

data.title: Binance Whales Defying Selloff Trend? Crucial Onchain Data Says THIS about Crypto Market
data.description:
The crypto market still faces macroeconomic uncertainty despite showing the potential for a bullish rebound. Meanwhile, Binance whales are in the spotlight as they defy market expectations. Onchain analytics data provider CryptoQuant illuminated the behavior of Binance whales to provide general sentiment in the crypto market
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/14/binance-whales-defying-selloff-trend-crucial-onchain-data-says-this-about-crypto-market/

data.title: Bitcoin held by publicly listed firms climbs 16% in Q1: Bitwise
data.description:
The amount of Bitcoin held on the books of publicly traded companies rose by 16. 1% in the first quarter of 2025, according to crypto fund issuer Bitwise. Total company Bitcoin (BTC) holdings rose to around 688,000 BTC by the end of Q1, with firms adding 95,431 BTC over the quarter, Bitwise reported in an April 14 X post. The value of the combined Bitcoin stacks rose around 2
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-holdings-public-firms-up-16-percent-q1-2025?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: The crypto market rebounded weakly, with the SocialFi sector rising 2.39% and the RWA sector continuing to fall 3.59%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On April 15, according to SoSoValue data, the crypto market rebounded from weakness, and the SocialFi sector rose 2.39% in 24 hours, of which Toncoin (TON) and Galxe (GAL) rose 3.05% and 3.08% respectively. In addition, the RWA sector fell 3.59%. Within the sector, due to the continued fermentation of the MANTRA incident, its native token OM fell another 32.74% in 24 hours.
At the same time, the crypto sector index reflecting the historical market conditions of the sector showed that the ssiSocialFi index rose 2.20% in 24 hours, while the ssiRWA index fell 4.04%.
In other sectors, the NFT sector rose 1.36% in 24 hours. Within the sector, Moca Coin (MOCA) and Animecoin (ANIME) rose 6.34% and 29.33% respectively; the AI ​​sector rose 0.28%, of which Render (RENDER) rose 3.80%; the CeFi sector rose 0.15%, Hyperliquid (HYPE) rose 3.54%; the PayFi sector rose 0.10%, and Monero (XMR) rose 3.87%; the Layer1 sector fell 0.08%, the Layer2 sector fell 0.68%, the DeFi sector fell 0.71%, and the Meme sector fell 2.07%, but Fartcoin (FARTCOIN) rose 6.82% against the trend.

data.title: Bitcoin poised for record-breaking surge, could reach $137K by mid-2025, predicts expert
data.description:
15-4-2025 – A prominent digital asset strategist has laid out a compelling trajectory for Bitcoin’s future valuation, with forecasts pointing towards unprecedented heights by mid-2025. Technical analysis from Titan of Crypto, as reported by BlockBeats, suggests Bitcoin could eclipse its previous records, potentially reaching $137,000 during the summer months of 2025. source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/bitcoin-poised-for-record-breaking-surge-could-reach-137k-by-mid-2025-predicts-expert/

data.title: Gate.io Launchpool Launches WalletConnect (WCT)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io will start WCT staking mining from 22:00 on April 14 to 21:00 on April 20 (UTC+8). Staking USDT, GT, and WCT to participate in Launchpool will share 100,000 WCT. The first phase of staking has been launched, and the GT mining pool is expected to reach an annualized rate of 11.73%, and the USDT new user pool is expected to reach an annualized rate of 115.83%. The second phase of staking will be launched at 21:00 on April 15 (UTC+8), and the WCT mining pool is expected to reach an annualized rate of 335.8%. Early staking is now open.

data.title: Early Ethereum Investor Continues ETH Sell-Off
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, an early Ethereum investor known as '2015 ICO 100,000 ETH OG' has sold another 612 ETH, valued at approximately $1 million, after a two-day interval. The investor acquired these tokens at a cost of $0.31 each.

Currently, the investor holds 29,577 ETH, worth around $47.98 million. Based on the current selling rate of approximately 630 ETH every two days, it is estimated that the remaining holdings will be sold over the next three months.

data.title: The 2015 Ethereum ICO whale sold 612 ETH again two days later, still holding 29,577 ETH
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of chain data analyst @ai_9684xtpa, two days later, "OG of ICO 100,000 ETH in 2015" sold 612 ETH (1 million US dollars) again, with the cost as low as 0.31 US dollars.
He currently still holds 29,577 ETH (47.98 million US dollars). According to the frequency of selling about 630 every two days, the remaining part will take nearly three months.
